checkin.journal:
Slept okeyish, was a bit thinking about the trip and not to be too late
Trip to London
Watched Crocodile Leylo and adventures cartoon
Worked a bit and prepared questions for the guys and meetings
Drove to Hotel all was smooth except the driver took central london route instead of going around but who knows coz everything is absolutely smashing full
We went to Gaucho and had stakes
Early bed time before 10
Tired after the long trip, London is cold definitely
Inspired by: huge plane but super old
